name: QueueCombinedFrame
title: QueueCombinedFrame
syntax: SensorErrorCode SysVarNamespace.QueueCombinedFrame(byte[] writeBuffer, dword writeBufferCount, dword readByteCount); // from 1
SensorErrorCode SysVarNamespace.QueueCombinedFrame(byte[] writeBuffer, dword writeBufferCount, dword readByteCount, dword startDelayNs); // from 2
description: This method is intended to be used for I2C master simulation. It queues a frame to write and then read the given number of bytes from the given slave.

parameters.name: writeBuffer
parameters.description: Buffer containing the bytes to be sent to the slave.

parameters.name: writeByteCount
parameters.description: Length of the write buffer in bytes.

parameters.name: readByteCount
parameters.description: The number of bytes to read from the slave.

parameters.name: startDelayNs
parameters.description: Delay in ns before the frame is actually sent to the slave.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
